Branch: worktree-foolery-cc43-groom-take
Commit: 862370238e05492d25bb7e1d749bbb5abb4d0ef5
Summary: Added post-create Groom then Take sequence. Groom uses stale grooming review enqueue/poll; Take unlocks only after successful grooming and reuses shared startBeatSession logic.
Verification: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
Note: sneka-agents git note could not be written locally because git notes failed with "unable to create temporary file: Read-only file system".
